scripts.build: echo 'Compiling lib-medium-13...' && sleep 1.1 && echo 'Generating types...' && sleep 0.2 && echo 'lib-medium-13 ready!'
scripts.test: echo 'Running lib-medium-13 tests...' && sleep .3 && echo '  Suite: unit - 5 passed' && echo '  Suite: integration - 3 passed'
scripts.dev: echo 'lib-medium-13 watching...' && while true; do sleep 2; echo '[lib-medium-13] rebuilt in 45ms'; done
